injectors.label: Photorealistic Output
injectors.promptFragment: The result must be photorealistic and indistinguishable from a professional photograph.

injectors.label: Preserve Composition
injectors.promptFragment: Maintain the overall composition, framing, and camera angle of the original image.

injectors.label: Preserve Lighting
injectors.promptFragment: Preserve the lighting conditions and atmosphere of the original scene.
